meaning: 基尔[德意志联邦共和国北部港市]
examples: Now the Gneisenau lay in Kiel.
Munich, Kiel and Stuttgart were the fastest.
Kiel is a beautiful environment, beautiful tree-lined city.
Here's his famous G minor Symphony, No. 40, played in Kiel, Germany, by the Polish Chamber Orchestra.
Frankfurt has three times the population of Kiel, but 12 times the trade-tax revenue, notes Mr Albig.
